members.label: fan
members.description: dark ceiling fan blade or decorative beam near top-right
members.long_form_open_description: A dark object resembling a ceiling fan blade or exposed decorative beam visible in the upper right portion of the image. Appears near the ceiling and casts a shadow; may be part of a fan or architectural element.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Above the living area and near the upper balcony region
